ab: Isaq aas?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: Na munhan aak patsanglavan masuaz sanglav.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: Maaq suu palkadan?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: Madia sa ka ismut, Ma valval aak, Unisin na masiul aak i danum.
ch: B:草太多了，我在砍草，等一下要澆水。
en: B:There’s too much grass, I’m cutting it, I’ll have to water it later.

ab: Dangaz i aak siza Kaul siin Tangaa azuq?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: Isauq suu tu?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: Pihan un Lakangkang didingalan.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: Suqazun in suu dalaq un?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: Laupang aak maisuqaz i dalaq, Unisin na minang.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: Sinuaz suu Sanaglav maqtu in sizaun?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: I-iti Tamana maqtu in sizaun, Idaiza Quduh nii’ang maqtu sizaun.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的龍葵就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbages here are ready to harvest, but the nightshade there is not yet ready.

ab: Maa na! Madia suu sa singkai Hutan.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: Dangazing punhan Pat-tilasan azuq?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: Malqamaq amu tu?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: Mapunda aam islalaqnut Iskaan Kalala na madamu Iskaan.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We’re releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: Madia iti iskaan?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: Iskaan kalala kumbu madia in sindamu Iskaan.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish traps have been full of fish, Iskaan kalala kumbu madia in sindamu Iskaan.

ab: Qanglas aas piqauq suu madamu Iskaan?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: Kusia aak Iskaan islalaupa manaq Iskaan.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: Maqansiap aas makusia Busulkavil?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打獵嗎?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: Qanglas aak makusia Haqu madamu taklilibus, Mintun amin siza Busul madas Asu qanup.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: Liniqaiban aipi Vanis?
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: Mavia aas tu maqansiap?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: Isia aipi Vanis maidapan, Paqpun ma aipi a liniqaiban Vanis tu daan.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: Kava mintivi imita Haqu, Haut udamu’an in?
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: Mavia aas tu maqansiap?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: Maqa Asu a maszang usakan, Kava ata makilavih.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: Maaq suu laupaku tatas-iun tu?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: Maaq aipi a batu haqu, Iskusia madamu Qamutis.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: Maaq suu pi-itunun qaimangsut un?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: Maaq aipun a Bantas haqu, Makusia istun madamu Sakut.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: Matumasqing maimadadaingaz sintuqumis. Haip tu qanian madia a tinishaquan.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: Tuza! Na adasun ita musuqis han Asang pisihalun mangunu maqusil!
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let’s take it back to the tribe and share it!
